subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! O thou who hast turned thy face to the lights of the Countenance, who soarest in the atmosphere of grace and gazest toward the horizon of the Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود یا ایها المتوجه الی انوار الوجه و الطائر فی هواء الفضل و الناظر الی افق الظهور
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
